title: Squirrel Removal in Bensonhurst Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion from attics and walls. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels invading your Bensonhurst home or business? Our expert squirrel removal team provides fast, humane solutions to protect your property from these persistent rodents. From the classic brownstones along Bay Parkway to multi-family homes near 86th Street, we've helped countless Bensonhurst residents reclaim their attics, walls, and chimneys from unwanted squirrel activity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bensonhurst for years with proven squirrel removal techniques that prioritize both effectiveness and animal welfare. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's dense residential neighborhoods and provide guaranteed results with full exclusion services to prevent re-entry.
localContext: Bensonhurst's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Shore Road Park make it prime territory for squirrel populations seeking shelter in residential attics and commercial buildings. The neighborhood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, attached homes, and older construction along 18th Avenue often provides multiple entry points that our team expertly seals after humane removal.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Bensonhurst typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Bensonhurst home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls (especially at dawn and dusk), visible entry holes near your roofline, chewed wood or wires, and squirrel droppings in your attic space. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting your roof during daylight hours.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, ethical methods for squirrel removal in compliance with New York wildlife regulations. Our process includes live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion doors, and safe relocation practices that don't harm the animals while permanently solving your squirrel problem.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Bensonhurst property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Bensonhurst locations. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the situation. All entry points are sealed immediately after removal to prevent new squirrels from entering.
